title: DCraft ; Rewritten
description: A mostly Vanilla+ experience to play alone or with friends
body:
Explore the World of "DCraft ; Rewritten".
A immersive experience in which you adventure in new Biomes within the Overworld, Nether and The End.
Big Mods that are included in this modpack are:
- Biomes O' Plenty
- Aquamirae
- Better End
- Create
- Dimensional Doors
- Incendium
and so much more!

or immers yourself in the modpack with mods like:
- AmbientSounds
- Blur+
- Camera Overhaul
- Eating Animation
- Effective
- Falling Leaves
- Fancy VFX
- First-person Model
- Immersive UI
and more
